text: “Yimm sennu wannteeb nan Farisiinba nba tee kpinkpannii damm na, li sii bi i paak. Linba na nbae bo ŋan nan yii tuun, ki daa nyikit li yenninba tumu.
translated: One day, some Pharisees and teachers of the law came from Jerusalem to see Jesus.
